name: Runn Resource Planning API
what_it_does: Resource planning and financial forecasting platform with REST API — combining team scheduling with real-time financial metrics (revenue, margin, utilization) for professional services firms, enabling data-driven resource decisions with budget forecasting.
use_cases: Querying project financial metrics (revenue, cost, margin) via API for financial dashboards
Creating and managing resource assignments across projects for automated scheduling
Syncing project data from CRM to Runn for resource planning pipeline
Forecasting team utilization and revenue by querying Runn planning data via API
Exporting time and cost data for integration with accounting and payroll systems
not_for: Hourly shift scheduling for frontline workers (use Deputy or 7shifts)
Simple time tracking without financial modeling (use Clockify)
Enterprise ERP with full accounting and multi-entity consolidation
best_when: A professional services or SaaS company needs resource planning with integrated financial forecasting — connecting people to projects with revenue and margin visibility.
avoid_when: You need pure time tracking, shift scheduling, or complex accounting beyond project-level financial metrics.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. Bearer token in Authorization header. Account-scoped access. GraphQL API available alongside REST. Webhook for planning change events.

pricing.paid_tiers: From $10/person/month for teams up to 50; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: No free tier. New Zealand company. API and webhooks available on all paid plans. Financial forecasting is key differentiator vs. Float or Resource Guru. Strong professional services focus. Growing startup with active development.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; contact support for specifics

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST and GraphQL APIs for projects, people, assignments, and financial data. Webhook for planning events. GraphQL is more powerful for complex queries. Good documentation for core use cases. Growing API surface as product matures.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Assignment creation creates new records — not idempotent. Project and people management idempotent by identifier. Read operations always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Both REST and GraphQL available — prefer GraphQL for complex financial data queries
NZ/AU data residency — check for data sovereignty requirements
Financial calculations (margin, utilization) are derived — understand the calculation model before integrating
Early-stage API — check changelog for breaking changes before updating agents

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. NZ/AU data residency. API key auth. Standard SaaS security practices. No formal certifications. New Zealand company with GDPR awareness for EU customers.
